description: Remove every direct React useEffect call and enforce the no-use-effect rule. Replace each call with the appropriate derived-state, event-handler, key/remount, data-query, or explicit useMountEffect pattern. The first child configures the Oxlint restriction; all migration children depend on it.

comments.text:
Plan for the two review findings on bsm-gbd/eliminate-direct-useeffect:

1. %s — replace the null Mermaid lifecycle component with a source-aware rendering hook; preserve stale-result protection and keep visible UI in MermaidDiagram.
2. %s — add a dependency-aware external lifecycle helper and restore App's [refreshWorkspaceState] and [applyTransition] contracts.

The work is independent and can be implemented in either order:

graph LR
    A[bsm-gbd.9 Mermaid render hook] --> C[verification and close]
    B[bsm-gbd.10 App dependency-aware lifecycle] --> C

title: Eliminate direct useEffect usage
